name: Bars & Cones
description: On-the-go indulgence — crunchy cones, coated bars, and stick treats for every mood and moment.

products.name: Zulubar Dark Crunch
products.tagline: Rich dark chocolate with a satisfying almond crunch.
products.description: Get ready to indulge in the darkness with the irresistible Zulubar Dark Crunch — the perfect combination of rich dark chocolate flavours and satisfying crunch with the goodness of almonds.

products.name: Choco Berry Krunch
products.tagline: Dark chocolate meets berry in a crunchy coated bar.
products.description: A bold combination of rich chocolate and tangy berry ice cream, coated in a crispy compound shell — the perfect balance of sweet and tart in every bite.

products.name: Choco Vanilla Krunch
products.tagline: Chocolate and vanilla swirled in a crunchy coated bar.
products.description: Two beloved flavours in one — a swirl of rich chocolate and smooth vanilla ice cream encased in a crispy compound coating for the ultimate on-the-go treat.

products.name: Cookie N Cream
products.tagline: Creamy vanilla meets crunchy cookie in a coated cone.
products.description: A crowd-pleasing classic — smooth vanilla and cookie cream ice cream in a white compound-coated cone, delivering the perfect balance of crunch and creaminess.

products.name: Hazelnut
products.tagline: Premium hazelnut in a rich, nutty ice cream bar.
products.description: Inspired by the world's love for hazelnut, this indulgent bar combines creamy hazelnut ice cream with a smooth chocolate coating for a truly premium experience.

name: Cups & Sundaes
description: Single-serve cups and indulgent sundaes — perfect for a quick treat or a dessert moment.

products.name: Choco Brownie Sundae
products.tagline: Warm brownie vibes in a single-serve sundae cup.
products.description: A single-serve sundae cup packed with chocolate ice cream and brownie-inspired swirls — the perfect quick indulgence for chocolate cravings on the go.

products.name: Vanilla Cup
products.tagline: Classic smooth vanilla in a convenient single-serve cup.
products.description: Pure, creamy vanilla ice cream in a convenient 50ml cup — the timeless classic that pairs with everything and satisfies every time.

name: Fruit Flavours
description: Bright, real-fruit scoops bursting with tropical freshness — from Mahabaleshwar Strawberry to Wild Berries.

products.name: Mahabaleshwar Strawberry
products.tagline: Sun-ripened strawberries from the hills of Mahabaleshwar.
products.description: A classic Havmor favourite — creamy strawberry ice cream made with 16% processed Mahabaleshwar strawberry fruit for a naturally sweet, vibrant finish.

products.name: Wild Berries
products.tagline: A real fruit explosion of strawberries, blueberries & raspberries.
products.description: Indulge in a real fruit explosion with Wild Berries BlockBuster! Made with real strawberries and bursting with the flavors of blueberries and raspberries — a wild ride of taste that elevates your senses.

products.name: Yoghurt Berry Krunch
products.tagline: Tangy yoghurt meets crunchy berry bits in every bite.
products.description: A refreshing blend of creamy yoghurt ice cream layered with real berry pieces and a satisfying krunch coating — light, tangy, and totally addictive.

name: Indian Classics
description: Traditional recipes reimagined — Kesar Pista, Rajwadi Kulfi Falooda, and other desi favourites.

products.name: Kesar Pista
products.tagline: Royal saffron and pistachio — a festive Indian classic.
products.description: A premium ice cream crafted with real pistachio nuts (2.9%), cardamom, and nature-identical saffron flavouring — rich, aromatic, and perfect for celebrations.

products.name: Rajwadi Kulfi Falooda
products.tagline: Creamy kulfi meets falooda with almonds, cashews & saffron.
products.description: Experience the luxurious flavor of Rajwadi Kulfi Falooda — a creamy blend of kulfi and falooda, infused with the richness of almonds, cashews, pistachios and the true flavour of saffron.

products.name: Rajbhog Ice Cream Shake
products.tagline: The royal Rajbhog flavour in a thick, indulgent shake.
products.description: Inspired by the classic Indian mithai, this thick shake blends the rich saffron and dry-fruit notes of Rajbhog into a creamy, indulgent ice cream drink.

name: Shakes & Specials
description: Thick shakes, fusion flavours, and limited-edition specials that push the boundaries of ice cream.

products.name: Cookie N Cream Shake
products.tagline: Thick cookie and cream shake — dessert in a glass.
products.description: A thick, indulgent shake blending cookie and cream ice cream into a rich, creamy drink loaded with cookie pieces — the ultimate dessert-in-a-glass experience.

name: Signature Tubs
description: Big, shareable tubs made for birthdays, celebrations, and family table moments. Rich flavours in generous portions.

products.name: Belgian Dark Chocolate
products.tagline: Premium Belgian cocoa in a rich, indulgent tub.
products.description: Crafted with premium Belgian dark chocolate, this signature tub delivers deep cocoa intensity and a velvety smooth finish — Havmor's most indulgent creation.

products.name: Biscotti
products.tagline: Italian-inspired biscuit and cream in a celebration tub.
products.description: A sophisticated tub flavour inspired by Italian biscotti — creamy ice cream with biscuit pieces and a buttery, caramelised finish that pairs beautifully with any celebration.

products.name: Choco Brownie Tub
products.tagline: Fudgy brownie pieces in rich chocolate ice cream.
products.description: A decadent tub of rich chocolate ice cream loaded with fudgy brownie pieces — the ultimate indulgence for chocolate lovers who want more in every scoop.
